title: Operational bulletins 2008 - Canada.ca
content:
## Operational bulletins 2008
In exceptional circumstances, operational bulletins may also be issued for one-time-only instructions or to provide urgent instructions to staff for a brief period while the relevant operational chapters are being updated.
- OB 093 – December 29, 2008 (Expired) Ministerial Instructions — Frequently Asked Questions
- OB 075 – December 19, 2008 (Expired) Post-Taylor Appeal Decision with Bill C-37 Consideration – Instructions
- OB 089 – December 2, 2008 (Expired) Ministerial Instructions
- OB 087 – November 30, 2008 Separation of Processing Streams at CPC-V – New vs. Existing Employer Applications
- OB 086 – November 30, 2008 (Expired) Temporary Foreign Workers – Strike Situations
- OB 085 – December 15, 2008 (Expired) Extensions of NAFTA Professional Work Permits
- OB 084 – November 7, 2008 (Expired) Petro-Canada Group of Employers: Use of Temporary Foreign Workers to Meet Labour Market Demands for the Petro-Canada Oil Sands Project
- OB 083 – October 30, 2008 Guidelines for Priority Processing in the Event of Disaster Situations
- OB 080 – October 2, 2008 (Expired) Regulatory Amendments – Provincial Nominee Program
- OB 079 – September 26, 2008 (Expired) Regulatory Amendments: Order of Admission for Permanent Resident Applicants and their Accompanying Family Members
- OB 077 – September 19, 2008 (Expired) Processing Canadian Experience Class Applications
- OB 076 – September 17, 2008 (Expired) Regulatory Changes to the Landing of Permanent Residents
- OB 071 – August 5, 2008 (Expired) Live-in Caregiver Program Applicants and Official Languages
- OB 069 – July 21, 2008 This operational bulletin has expired. Please refer to OB 116 for current information.
- OB 063 – September 24, 2008 Assessing Excessive Demand on Social Services
- OB 060 – June 16, 2008 Regulatory amendments – Elimination of the guarantor requirement from the Permanent Resident Card application process
- OB 058 – April 22, 2008 (Expired) Recent Changes to the Post-Graduation Work Permit ( PGWP ) Program
- OB 056 – April 15, 2008 Revised Security Screening Data Requirements
- OB 055 – April 9, 2008 (Expired) End of transition period for Unauthorized Immigration Consultants
- OB 054 – March 20, 2008 (Expired) Pre-Removal Risk Assessment ( PRRA ) – Facing the Death Penalty – Referral of cases when the issue of assurances is not resolved
- OB 041 – March 31, 2008 Update to departmental position on non-machine readable Czech passports
- OB 049 – February 12, 2008 (Expired) Implementation of additional Temporary Foreign Worker Units in Ontario and Atlantic Regions

## All operational bulletins (by year)
